macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Falls 2% for Fifth Straight Week Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 declined 2% last week, marking five consecutive weekly losses for the first time since 2022, while U.S. 10-year Treasury yields rose to 4.43% and Brent crude climbed to $112 per barrel.

items.title: Oil Prices Drop as Iran Declares Strait of Hormuz Open During Lebanon Ceasefire
items.summary: Oil prices fell to about $90 per barrel after Iran announced the Strait of Hormuz would remain open throughout a 10-day Lebanon ceasefire, though elevated prices raise concerns for central bank inflation control.

items.title: Middle East Conflict Fuels Energy Security Push and AI-Driven Infrastructure Investments
items.summary: The economic shock from Middle East tensions is accelerating government efforts to secure energy supplies and resilient supply chains, amplified by rising AI power demand unlocking opportunities in energy, infrastructure, and commodities.

items.title: Consumer Confidence Hits Record Low Amid Stubborn Inflation and Middle East War
items.summary: U.S. consumer sentiment reached an all-time low per University of Michigan survey, driven by higher costs in groceries, housing, healthcare, and fuel disruptions from the Middle East conflict.

items.title: Markets Optimistic After Iran Reopens Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Markets showed optimism following Iran's announcement reopening the Strait of Hormuz, amid ongoing concerns over inflation expectations indicated by bond yields.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Charles Schwab Enters Crypto Market Amid Growing Legitimacy
items.summary: Charles Schwab is fully entering the crypto arena, signaling increased legitimacy alongside global adoption like Pakistan's pro-crypto moves. This contrasts with ongoing risks from massive DeFi hacks.

items.title: DeFi TVL Drops Across Top 20 Chains After $292M KelpDAO Hack
items.summary: Total Value Locked (TVL) in DeFi fell on all top 20 chains following the $292 million KelpDAO exploit. Ethereum saw a 17.91% decline in 30 days as users exited positions.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Firm Near $76K with Strong Institutional Buying
items.summary: Bitcoin rebounded from a dip near $73,800 support, holding steady around $76K due to robust institutional demand and buyer interest at key levels.

items.title: Michael Saylor's MicroStrategy Buys $1B in Bitcoin via Preferred Stock
items.summary: Michael Saylor announced a $1 billion Bitcoin purchase (about 14,000 coins), fully funded through his perpetual preferred stock instrument, highlighting innovative financing for BTC accumulation.

items.title: Bitmain Makes Largest Ethereum Purchase of the Year
items.summary: Bitmain executed the biggest Ethereum purchase of the year, joining other major buyers like Tom Lee at Fundstrat amid positive market sentiment.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Multiple Unannounced Switch 2 Games Appear Online
items.summary: Several unannounced Nintendo Switch 2 games have surfaced online in recent weeks, including titles like Mega Man 64. The leak suggests multiple publishers are preparing games for the platform ahead of official announcements.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Reync Reveal Expected This Week
items.summary: Ubisoft is set to officially reveal Assassin's Creed Black Flag Reync this week following earlier leaks and speculation about the project.

items.title: War Thunder Announces Major Vehicle Premium Returns and New Event
items.summary: War Thunder is releasing multiple vehicle premiums this week and announcing a new event, marking a busy update cycle for the military simulation game.

items.title: Farming Simulator 25 Receives New Equipment Updates
items.summary: Farming Simulator 25 has released new release notes and equipment additions including the New Holland TJ 9000 tractor and Witcombe machinery updates.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple Announces Leadership Changes: John Ternus to Become CEO, Johny Srouji Named Chief Hardware Officer
items.summary: John Ternus, Apple's senior VP of Hardware Engineering, will become CEO on September 1, with Tim Cook transitioning to executive chairman. Johny Srouji assumes an expanded role as chief hardware officer effective immediately.

items.title: US Air Force Cancels RTX's Ground-Control Network for Next-Gen GPS Satellites
items.summary: The US Air Force canceled RTX Corp.'s ground-control network for next-generation GPS satellites due to years of delays and cost overruns.
